name: HR Workflow 2：歷史信件匯入（近30天）

conditions.rightValue: 面試|Interview|面談|初試|複試|面談通知|面試通知|interview

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ ({model:'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',max_tokens:300,messages:[{role:'user',content:'你是HR信件解析助手。請從以下信件萃取結構化資料，用JSON回覆，不要加其他文字。
需要欄位：candidate_name,applied_position,department,interview_date(YYYY-MM-DD),interview_time(HH:MM),round,location,hr_owner（找不到填null）

主旨：' + $('Code：Regex 解析面試資料').item.json.email_subject + '
內容：' + ($('Code：Regex 解析面試資料').item.json.body_text || '').substring(0,1500)}]}) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO candidates (name, applied_position, department, source, status)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.candidate_name }}',
  '{{ $json.applied_position }}',
  '{{ $json.department }}',
  'Outlook歷史匯入',
  'in_progress'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM candidates WHERE name = '{{ $json.candidate_name }}'
);
SELECT 1 AS ok;

WITH cand AS (
  SELECT id FROM candidates
  WHERE name = '{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.candidate_name }}'
  ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO interviews (
  candidate_id, interview_date, interview_time, round,
  location, hr_owner, status, email_subject, email_msg_id, email_web_link
)
SELECT
  cand.id,
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.interview_date }}','null'),'undefined')::DATE,
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.interview_time }}','null'),'undefined'),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.round }}','null'),'undefined')::INT, 1),
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.location }}','null'),'undefined'),
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.hr_owner }}','null'),'undefined'),
  'scheduled',
  '{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.email_subject }}',
  '{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.email_msg_id }}',
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.email_web_link }}','null'),'undefined')
FROM cand
WHERE NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code?????').first().json.interview_date }}','null'),'undefined') IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO NOTHING;
SELECT 1 AS ok;

INSERT INTO email_logs
  (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, candidate_id)
SELECT
  '{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.email_msg_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.email_subject }}',
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.sender }}','null'),'undefined'),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.received_at }}','null'),'undefined')::TIMESTAMPTZ, NOW()),
  'inserted',
  (SELECT id FROM candidates WHERE name = '{{ $('Code：合併分支').first().json.candidate_name }}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1)
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE
  SET action = 'inserted', processed_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO email_logs
  (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, error_msg)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.email_msg_id }}', '{{ $json.email_subject }}', '{{ $json.sender }}',
   NOW(), 'skipped', '{{ $json.error_msg }}')
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO NOTHING;
